sections.paragraph:
Original: ינק

Transliteration: yânaq

Phonetic: yaw-nak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to suckle, nurse, suck
    1. (Qal)
      1. to suck
      2. suckling, babe (substantive)
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to give suck to, nurse
      2. nursing, nursing woman, nurse (participle)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 874

Part(s) of speech: Verb
